options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <object_list> # List of clocks, intances or pins

options.name: -fall
options.description: Applies the value to the falling signals

options.name: -high
options.description: Sets non-controlling value of clock as high

options.name: -low
options.description: Sets non-controlling value of clock as low

options.name: -rise
options.description: Applies the value to the rising signals
